use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials with continuous vertical scroll animation
Social proof section for landing pages showcasing user reviews
Testimonial carousel for portfolio or case study pages
Review section for product or service pages
ai_summary: A testimonial display component featuring continuously animated vertical scrolling of testimonial cards, each containing user avatars, names, roles, and quote text. Built with framer-motion for smooth looped animation, styled with rounded corners, subtle primary-tinted shadows, and a clean minimalist aesthetic suitable for any industry requiring social proof.
